title: [refactor] Install pino + pino-pretty, extract config module
description:
Refactor .sandcastle/main.mts to:
1. Install pino and pino-pretty as dependencies
2. Extract the inline configuration section into a dedicated config module (.sandcastle/config.mts)
3. Replace console.log/console.error with structured pino logging
4. Add tests for the config module
notes:
Implemented:
- Installed pino and pino-pretty dependencies
- Extracted config from .sandcastle/main.mts into .sandcastle/config.mts
- Replaced console.log/console.error with structured pino logging in main.mts
- Added .sandcastle/config.test.mts with tests for resolveHostPath, readOpencodeApiKey, and constants
- Updated tsconfig.json for .mts extension imports
- Updated package.json test script to run both test suites
